scripts.dev:debug: VITE_DEV_GUI=true vite --host & sleep 2 && '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=/tmp/rubato-chrome-debug --auto-open-devtools-for-tabs https://localhost:5173
scripts.kiosk: npm run prod && npx serve dist & sleep 2 && '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' --kiosk --start-fullscreen --disable-infobars --disable-session-crashed-bubble --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required --use-fake-ui-for-media-stream http://localhost:3000
scripts.check: biome check . && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json && vite build
scripts.interact: INTERACT=1 HEADED=1 npx playwright test e2e/preview.spec.ts --grep interact
